configuration.overlap_policy: one open position per ticker per scenario

confirmed_breakout.next_action: Retire this scanner formulation from active Shadow signals and redesign the entry hypothesis before any new backtest.

tradeable_second_leg.next_action: Retire this scanner formulation from active Shadow signals and redesign the entry hypothesis before any new backtest.

production_decision.rule: P1.4 performs frozen baseline adjudication only. Production and Shadow Mode cannot be promoted automatically.

validation_repair.portfolio_non_overlap_definition: one open position per ticker per scenario across both paths
validation_repair.path_non_overlap_definition: one open position per ticker + path + scenario
validation_repair.reason: Do not erase Second Leg path samples because of prior Confirmed Breakout positions; do not evaluate a fixed target with a stop wider than the scenario RR permits.

p14_frozen_baseline_adjudication.fold_pass_rule: annual OOS n>=10, average>0, median>0, PF>=1.20, stop rate<55%
p14_frozen_baseline_adjudication.repeatability_rule: same unfiltered path/scenario passes >=3/5 annual folds including latest holdout

confirmed_breakout.next_action: Retire this scanner formulation from active Shadow signals and redesign the entry hypothesis before any new backtest.

tradeable_second_leg.next_action: Retire this scanner formulation from active Shadow signals and redesign the entry hypothesis before any new backtest.

p15_path_provenance_audit.previous_invalid_reason: live experimental_shadow_signal filtered historical samples, excluding confirmed-only technical events and duplicating active second-leg candidates across both technical paths
